'''''Hart''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The warship's most notable mission came when it was tasked with helping to evacuate the Alliance [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']]. Thanks to its [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] escorts, it escaped with the ''Anvil''{{'s}} survivors.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
